content: HA add-on base images at ghcr.io/home-assistant/: base (Alpine 3.24, latest), base-debian (bookworm/trixie), base-python (3.12-3.14 on Alpine). All are multi-arch since 2026.03.1 release. Old arch-prefixed images (amd64-base, aarch64-base) still available but deprecated. Latest release: 2026.06.1 (June 2026). Images include s6-overlay v3, bashio, and tempio. Recommended: ghcr.io/home-assistant/base-debian:bookworm for .NET+Python mixed container.
